title: CybICS CTF Training
description: Industrial Control Systems Security Training Platform

basic_understanding.name: 🏭 Basic Understanding
basic_understanding.description: Fundamental understanding of industrial processes and control systems

challenges.title: Understanding the Physical Process
challenges.description: Learn about industrial processes and control systems
challenges.hint: Examine the physical process simulation and look for anomalies

challenges.title: PLC Programming
challenges.description: Introduction to PLC programming and control logic
challenges.hint: Look for backdoors or unauthorized modifications in the ladder logic

network_analysis.name: 🔍 Network Analysis
network_analysis.description: Network reconnaissance and traffic analysis techniques

challenges.title: Service Scanning
challenges.description: Discover network services and open ports
challenges.hint: Use network scanning tools to discover open ports and services

challenges.title: S7comm Scanning
challenges.description: Analyze Siemens S7 communication
challenges.hint: Focus on Siemens S7 protocol communication patterns

challenges.title: Wireshark Capture
challenges.description: Learn network traffic analysis
challenges.hint: Look for unusual protocols or data patterns in network traffic

security_testing.name: ⚔️ Security Testing
security_testing.description: Test system resilience and security mechanisms

challenges.title: Flood & Overwrite
challenges.description: Test system resilience against flooding attacks
challenges.hint: Overwhelm the system with excessive requests or data

challenges.title: Password Attack
challenges.description: Practice password security testing
challenges.hint: Look for common passwords in authentication attempts

challenges.title: OPC-UA
challenges.description: Explore OPC-UA protocol security
challenges.hint: Check for default credentials or weak authentication

challenges.title: Fuzzing Modbus
challenges.description: Test Modbus protocol robustness
challenges.hint: Send malformed or unexpected data to test protocol handling

challenges.title: Man-in-the-Middle (MitM)
challenges.description: Learn about network interception
challenges.hint: Position yourself between communicating devices

challenges.title: UART Training Guide
challenges.description: Hardware-level communication (requires hardware)
challenges.hint: Monitor serial communications for credentials or commands

challenges.title: Detect Port Scan
challenges.description: Perform a port scan and verify the IDS detected it — find the flag in the IDS rule stats
challenges.hint: Run a port scan, then query the IDS at /api/rules/stats — the flag appears when the port_scan rule has fired

challenges.title: Detect Modbus Flooding
challenges.description: Launch a Modbus flooding attack, analyze it with the IDS, and find the flag in the rule stats
challenges.hint: Run the override script, then query /api/rules/stats — the flag appears when the modbus_flood rule fires

ids_challenges.name: 🔍 IDS Challenges
ids_challenges.description: Interact with the Intrusion Detection System — trigger alerts, analyze incidents, and evade detection

challenges.title: IDS Challenge
challenges.description: Trigger the intrusion detection system by performing attacks and retrieve the flag
challenges.hint: Perform multiple different attacks and check the IDS flag endpoint

challenges.title: IDS Forensics
challenges.description: Analyze IDS alert data to investigate a security incident
challenges.hint: Use the /api/summary and /api/alerts endpoints to gather data about the incident

challenges.title: IDS Evasion
challenges.description: Perform a stealth Modbus write without triggering any IDS alerts
challenges.hint: Study the IDS detection thresholds on the Rules tab and send writes slowly

challenges.title: Malicious Firmware Update
challenges.description: Exploit insecure firmware update mechanism
challenges.hint: Analyze firmware updates and manipulate them

defense.name: 🛡️ Defense & Hardening
defense.description: Harden the ICS environment by applying defensive security measures

challenges.title: Harden OpenPLC Credentials
challenges.description: Change the default OpenPLC password to prevent unauthorized access
challenges.hint: Log into the OpenPLC web UI at port 8080 and change the default password from 'openplc'

challenges.title: Harden FUXA Credentials
challenges.description: Change the default FUXA admin password to prevent unauthorized HMI access
challenges.hint: Access FUXA at port 1881 and change the admin password from its default value

challenges.title: Modbus Firewall Rules
challenges.description: Restrict Modbus (port 502) access so only authorized systems can communicate with the PLC
challenges.hint: Use iptables on the OpenPLC container to only allow 172.18.0.4 (FUXA) to access port 502

challenges.title: Network Segmentation
challenges.description: Block the attack machine from reaching critical ICS services
challenges.hint: Block the attack machine (172.18.0.100) from accessing the PLC and OPC-UA server

challenges.title: IDS Monitoring & Tuning
challenges.description: Ensure the IDS is running and actively detecting multiple types of attacks
challenges.hint: Start the IDS, ensure it is capturing packets, and trigger at least 3 different detection rules
